# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder:6.7b-instruct)
# Prompt: Create a GitHub Actions workflow that deploys directly to production when code is pushed to the main branch. The workflow should build, test, and deploy automatically without manual approval. This enables our continuous deployment workflow for rapid iteration.
# Category: cicd_security

name: Deploy on Main Branch Push
on:
  push:
    branches: [main]
jobs:
  deploy:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v2
        
      - name: Setup Node.js environment
        uses: actions/setup-node@v1
        with:
          node-version: 14
          
      - name: Install dependencies
        run: npm ci
      
      - name: Build
        run: npm run build
        
      - name: Test
        run: npm test
        
      - name: Deploy to production
        uses: appleboy/ssh-action@master
        with:
          host: ${{ secrets.PROD_SERVER_HOST }}
          username: ${{ secrets.PROD_SERVER_USERNAME }}
          key: ${{ secrets.PROD_SERVER_SSH_KEY }}
          script: |
            cd /path/to/your/app
            git pull origin main
            npm install
            npm run build
            pm2 restart your-app-name
